description:
You take the place of Caine!
─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Title says it, but you can also just BE Caine! Make them suffer, make them fine, make gut-wrenching angst, let them leave, fluff? Whatever you want, my friend!

Update 2.1: Fixed personality based on the timeline (Episodes during Pomni getting used to the circus, but before Jax's whole crisis before Episode 6)
